name_cn:
[Big Stock 🔥Genuine Leather] Real photos🎬
Classic Caramel 16.5cm!!️
A cute golden-brown, finally waiting for Marmont to release a new color,
And not that eye-straining macaron color, this time it's a super beautiful caramel,
This color is absolutely perfect for autumn and winter outfits,
The chance of clashing with other bags is very low right now, so buy it quickly!!!
